originalTitle: These are the market’s new hot stocks as investors flee from tech
summary: Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.
content: Investors are suddenly dumping technology stocks and rotating into other areas — including health insurers, banks and retailers.
chineseTitle: 随着投资者逃离科技股，这些是市场的新热门股票
chineseSummary: 投资者突然抛售科技股，转向其他领域——包括健康保险公司、银行和零售商。
chineseContent: 投资者突然抛售科技股，转向其他领域——包括健康保险公司、银行和零售商。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
